tables.description: Trip fact table for ride orders and their completion or cancellation status by request day.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Trip status such as completed, cancelled_by_driver, cancelled_by_client

metrics.name: cancellation rate
metrics.description: Cancelled trips divided by total valid trips

relationships.description: Join client_id and driver_id to users_id

tables.description: User dimension with banned flag and role information.

columns.name: role
columns.description: Whether the user is a client or driver

relationships.description: Trips join on client_id and driver_id
